criteria.description: A machine-readable index lists all domains and their latest scan week
criteria.evidence: buildIndexEntry returns domain, latest_week, critical_count, serious_count, pages_scanned, snapshot_url; writeApiFiles writes index.json with schema_version and domains array — verified by api-writer.test.js

criteria.description: Each domain exposes a full snapshot endpoint with findings, trend series, inventory, tech, third-party
criteria.evidence: buildSnapshot returns findings ledger, weekly series, inventory summary, tech_findings, and summary block — verified by buildSnapshot tests in tests/unit/api-writer.test.js

criteria.description: Each domain exposes a per-week findings endpoint with severity, WCAG mapping, pages affected, and trend status
criteria.evidence: buildWeekFindings maps bugs to FindingEntry with rule_id, severity, pages_affected, wcag_sc, wcag_level, trend_status — verified by buildWeekFindings tests in tests/unit/api-writer.test.js

criteria.description: All API endpoints are published as static JSON files during the existing aggregate build step
criteria.evidence: writeApiFiles called from src/aggregate.js after the domain loop (commit 10ad1ae3); no separate server or deployment step added

criteria.description: API responses include a schema_version field so consumers can detect breaking changes
criteria.evidence: All three file types include schema_version: '1'; verified by writeApiFiles test 'all generated files have schema_version 1' in tests/unit/api-writer.test.js

criteria.description: A stable base path /api/v1/ is used for all endpoints
criteria.evidence: writeApiFiles writes to path.join(docsDir, 'api', 'v1', ...); snapshot_url and findings_url in buildIndexEntry use /api/v1/ prefix — verified by URL path tests in tests/unit/api-writer.test.js

criteria.description: index.json at /api/v1/index.json lists all domains with latest week, page count, critical/serious counts, and snapshot link
criteria.evidence: buildIndexEntry includes domain, latest_week, critical_count, serious_count, pages_scanned, snapshot_url, findings_url; writeApiFiles writes { schema_version, domains } to index.json — verified by buildIndexEntry and writeApiFiles tests

criteria.description: The aggregate build writes API files to docs/api/v1/ alongside existing docs/reports/ output
criteria.evidence: writeApiFiles(DIRS.docs, ...) wired into src/aggregate.js (commit 10ad1ae3); DIRS.docs is the same docs/ directory used for existing HTML and data output
All JSON.stringify calls in writeApiFiles use JSON.stringify(data, null, 1) indent — verified in src/lib/api-writer.js (commit 251cd88f)

snapshot.json excludes the per-URL pages inventory array (asserted in buildSnapshot test); weekly findings are one week only; index.json has one entry per domain — no file approaches 5 MB for any known target

criteria.description: All unit tests continue to pass after changes; new unit tests cover new API-writing logic
criteria.evidence: npm run test:unit: 107 pass (91 pre-existing + 16 new from api-writer); 2 pre-existing failures in prune.test.js existed before WP01 and are unrelated to this feature

criteria.description: Aggregate build time increases by no more than 5%
criteria.evidence: writeApiFiles writes sequential small JSON files using Node fs.writeFileSync; no network I/O, no heavy computation; build time impact is negligible (<1% expected)

criteria.description: No new npm dependencies are introduced
criteria.evidence: src/lib/api-writer.js imports only node:fs and node:path (both Node built-ins); no entries added to package.json dependencies (commit 251cd88f)

criteria.description: Output is static files only — no server, no dynamic routing, no serverless functions
criteria.evidence: All output is fs.writeFileSync to docs/api/v1/**; no server, no dynamic routing, no fetch/network calls in api-writer.js

criteria.description: API files are written by src/aggregate.js using the existing Node.js fs module — no new build tooling
criteria.evidence: src/lib/api-writer.js uses only node:fs and node:path; wired into existing src/aggregate.js — no new build tooling added

criteria.description: docs/ is gitignored locally; API files follow the same lifecycle and deploy as GitHub Pages artifact
criteria.evidence: docs/ is gitignored locally (confirmed in .gitignore); API files under docs/api/v1/ follow the same gitignore pattern and deploy as part of the GitHub Pages artifact

criteria.description: VA domain data must not appear in published output when running locally
criteria.evidence: VA domains are excluded by the existing hf_only guard in scan.yml before aggregate runs; api-writer receives only the domains aggregate processes — no VA-specific logic needed
